author: claude-opus
text:
dep tree: parent/child rendering with box-drawing

Rebuild `bl dep tree` around the real parent/child hierarchy. Dep
edges and gates now render as inline annotations on each row rather
than as nesting, which is what the spec calls for and what the
previous flat-list output never managed. Adds cycle protection,
multi-root handling, and a --json nested shape next to the text
output. ASCII fallback engages on non-tty / --plain.
